/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/Config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/Controller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/StatsExporter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/modes/BridgeMode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/modes/MeshMode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/modes/P2PMode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sdr-datalink.dir/modes/ScanMode.cpp.o" -o sdr-datalink  ../core/libsdr_core.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libiio.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libliquid.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
